column1: What?s New - 19th March 2026 AIRAC (v2)
The UK & Ireland SRD contains a number of key ATC preferred routeings transiting UK/Irish airspace. Due to the large volume of possible
routeings, not all variations of potential routeing may appear in the SRD.
A route portion which does not appear in the SRD may still be filed, as long as it complies with any applicable RAD/AIP restrictions.
Any queries regarding whether or not a particular routeing is valid should be addressed to the contact details provided.
